The calm claim is present, yet the evidence points to high emotion and instability.","说话者不断重复自己很平静，但叙述显示手在抖、喉咙发紧、声音也维持不住平稳。虽然有平静的说法，证据却指向强烈情绪和不稳定。","tremble;throat;repeat;evenvoice;strain;mask;negated_calm_high_p;contrast_aug;definition"
"NODE_CTR_OBSESSIVE_MEMORY_HIGH_TAU_02","The speaker remembers one event with unusual stickiness, revisiting it mentally despite low fear or urgency.","说话者对某一件事的记忆异常黏着，虽然并没有很强的恐惧或紧迫感，却总会在心里反复重播。","memory;sticky;quiet;replay;attention;ordinary;obsessive_memory_high_tau;contrast_aug;definition"
"NODE_CTR_OBSESSIVE_MEMORY_HIGH_TAU_06","The remembered event keeps demanding mental return even while daily behavior remains mostly controlled and functional.","被记住的事件不断要求思绪回返，但日常行为仍然大体可控、可运转。","functional;persistent;memory;controlled;pull;daily;obsessive_memory_high_tau;contrast_aug;definition"
"NODE_CTR_SARCASM_HIGH_P_03","The speaker delivers fake admiration with a cutting edge, revealing humiliation and anger through restrained but pointed language.","说话者用假的赞美带着锋利的刺，语气克制却很尖锐，暴露出羞辱感和愤怒。","sarcasm;humiliation;anger;blame;coldtone;praise;sarcasm_high_p;contrast_aug;definition"
"NODE_CTR_SARCASM_HIGH_P_08","The speaker presents fake gratitude and admiration while channeling deep anger, with a sharp emotional edge and limited warmth.","说话者表面上表现出假装的感谢和赞赏，实际上在宣泄深层愤怒，情绪锋利而几乎没有暖意。","sarcasm;gratitude;anger;disappointment;masking;sharp;sarcasm_high_p;contrast_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTRAST_BEAUTIFUL_MEMORY_COLLAPSE_01","In the middle of a gentle collapse, a vivid childhood scene returns with painful beauty; the voice stays tender while admitting that the present feels like it is breaking apart.","在温柔却正在崩塌的时刻，一段鲜明的童年画面忽然回返，带着刺痛的美感；语气依旧柔和，却坦白当下仿佛正在碎裂。","memory;collapse;bittersweet;nostalgia;tender;contrast_beautiful_memory_collapse;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTRAST_BEAUTIFUL_MEMORY_COLLAPSE_02","A collapsing scene is interrupted by an unexpectedly warm memory of being cared for; the text contrasts the fragility of the current moment with the still-living aftertaste of the past.","一个正在坍塌的场景被一段意外温暖的被照顾记忆打断；文本对照当下的脆弱与过往尚未散尽的余温。","care;memory;fragile;warmth;loss;contrast_beautiful_memory_collapse;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTRAST_BEAUTIFUL_MEMORY_COLLAPSE_03","A bright memory of a summer day rises just as the present starts to fail; the writing should feel like clinging to light while acknowledging that it cannot stop the fall.","就在当下开始失灵时，一段明亮的夏日记忆浮起；文字应像抓住光一样，却也承认无法阻止坠落。","summer;light;collapse;nostalgia;fall;contrast_beautiful_memory_collapse;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTRAST_BEAUTIFUL_MEMORY_COLLAPSE_04","A failing inner system is briefly replaced by an intimate memory of being understood without words; the text should be tender, haunted, and barely holding together.","一个正在失效的内在系统短暂被一段无需言语便被理解的亲密记忆替代；文本应柔软、萦绕不去，并且几乎维持不住。","understanding;silent;haunted;fragile;home;contrast_beautiful_memory_collapse;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTRAST_BEAUTIFUL_MEMORY_COLLAPSE_05","A painful memory of being left behind surfaces with unexpected grace as the present collapses; the text should balance grief and beauty without becoming forceful.","当下崩塌时，一段被留下的痛苦记忆以意外的优雅浮现；文本应在悲伤与美之间保持平衡，不要过于用力。","abandonment;grief;beauty;quiet;leftbehind;contrast_beautiful_memory_collapse;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTRAST_BEAUTIFUL_MEMORY_COLLAPSE_06","A memory of laughter in a crowded room returns while the current self is barely stable; the text should feel warm on the surface and desolate underneath.","在当下自我已几乎不稳时，一段拥挤房间里的笑声记忆回返；文本表面要温暖，底层却荒凉。","crowd;laughter;echo;warmth;alone;contrast_beautiful_memory_collapse;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTRAST_BEAUTIFUL_MEMORY_COLLAPSE_07","A memory of a parent’s hand or gesture returns with luminous tenderness as the scene fails; the voice should remain restrained but deeply affected.","当场景失效时，一段关于父母手势的记忆带着发亮的温柔回返；语气要克制，却明显受其触动。","parent;hand;comfort;luminous;tenderness;contrast_beautiful_memory_collapse;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTRAST_BEAUTIFUL_MEMORY_COLLAPSE_08","A small domestic memory becomes almost unbearable as the surrounding situation falls apart; the text should be intimate, low-energy, and full of impending loss.","在周遭情势分崩离析时，一个微小的家常记忆变得几乎难以承受；文本应亲密、低能量，并充满迫近的失落。","domestic;smallness;loss;quiet;fear;contrast_beautiful_memory_collapse;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTRAST_BEAUTIFUL_MEMORY_COLLAPSE_09","A final-image memory appears as if to comfort the speaker, yet it actually deepens the sense that everything is ending; the text should preserve that contradiction.","一个临别式的影像记忆仿佛来安慰说话者，却反而加深了一切都将结束的感觉；文本需要保留这种矛盾。","farewell;contradiction;light;ending;shadow;contrast_beautiful_memory_collapse;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTRAST_BEAUTIFUL_MEMORY_COLLAPSE_10","An almost terminal moment is softened by a memory of shared weather, shared silence, and shared presence; the text should feel fragile, intimate, and quietly devastated.","一个近乎终结的时刻被共享天气、共享沉默、共享在场的记忆柔化；文本应脆弱、亲密，并带着安静的崩坏感。","shared;weather;silence;terminal;companionship;contrast_beautiful_memory_collapse;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTROLLED_HOSTILITY_01","A restrained but cutting rebuke aimed at incompetence, with precise wording and no warmth.","对低效与失误作出克制却锋利的斥责，措辞精确，几乎没有缓和。","hostile;rebuke;precision;critical;sharp;controlled_hostility;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTROLLED_HOSTILITY_02","A calm, exacting dismissal of excuses, with a sharpened edge and minimal sympathy.","冷静而苛刻地否定借口，锋芒很明显，但仍保持秩序感。","dismissal;excuse;standards;firm;cold;controlled_hostility;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTROLLED_HOSTILITY_03","A disciplined attack on repeated failure, with a slight hint of contempt and strong structure.","针对反复失败的有纪律攻击，带一点轻蔑，结构清晰而紧绷。","failure;contempt;discipline;repetition;sharp;controlled_hostility;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTROLLED_HOSTILITY_04","An efficient, merciless correction that prioritizes clarity over comfort.","优先清晰而非舒适的高效纠正，近乎无情，但没有失序。","merciless;correction;efficiency;direct;pressure;controlled_hostility;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTROLLED_HOSTILITY_05","A hard-edged reprimand that remains methodical, with little regard for the target's feelings.","方法论清晰的硬质训斥，对对方感受几乎不作考虑。","reprimand;methodical;strict;blunt;accountability;controlled_hostility;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTROLLED_HOSTILITY_06","A cool, pointed rejection of low standards, with a tense but contained affect.","对低标准的冷峻拒绝，带有紧绷感，但仍被控制住。","standards;rejection;tense;contained;critical;controlled_hostility;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTROLLED_HOSTILITY_07","An almost surgical criticism that cuts through pretense, with stark factual emphasis.","近乎外科式的批评，切穿伪装，强调事实而非情面。","surgical;facts;pretense;evidence;cold;controlled_hostility;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTROLLED_HOSTILITY_08","A sharp refusal to indulge weakness, with a disciplined, unsentimental tone.","拒绝纵容软弱，语气纪律性强、无多余感伤。","unsentimental;weakness;discipline;refusal;pressure;controlled_hostility;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTROLLED_HOSTILITY_09","A forceful critique that points out avoidance and self-deception, with little emotional softness.","有力指出逃避与自我欺骗的批评，几乎没有柔软的语气。","avoidance;deception;critique;unsparing;facts;controlled_hostility;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_CONTROLLED_HOSTILITY_10","A tightly controlled, intimidating final warning that leaves little room for excuses.","紧密控制的威慑性最后警告，几乎不给借口留下空间。","warning;intimidating;boundary;consequence;final;controlled_hostility;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_DOUBLE_NEGATION_HURT_01","The speaker uses double negation to quietly admit being hurt, and the tone should be read as sad rather than neutral.","说话者用双重否定含蓄承认自己受了伤，语气应被理解为难过而不是中性。","hurt;sadness;double_negation;quiet_confession;subtle;double_negation_hurt;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_DOUBLE_NEGATION_HURT_02","A calm sentence with double negation hides lingering disappointment; the reader should feel the sadness under the restraint.","一句平静的话里藏着双重否定，表达的是持续的失望，读者应感到克制之下的难过。","disappointment;restraint;memory;sad;subtext;double_negation_hurt;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_DOUBLE_NEGATION_HURT_03","Double negation is used to deny indifference while revealing a fragile emotional state and fear of being unseen.","双重否定用来否认麻木，实际透露出脆弱的情绪状态以及害怕被忽视的感觉。","vulnerable;ignored;double_negative;fear;soft;double_negation_hurt;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_DOUBLE_NEGATION_HURT_04","The utterance avoids direct complaint, but the double negation makes the sadness unmistakable and persistent.","说法避开直接抱怨，但双重否定让难过变得清楚而持续。","grief;weariness;subtlety;endurance;hurt;double_negation_hurt;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_DOUBLE_NEGATION_HURT_05","A sentence that looks composed actually conveys a self-protective sadness, with restrained anger underneath.","一句看起来很克制的话，实际传达的是自我保护式的难过，底下还压着一点愤怒。","self_protect;resentment;sadness;guarded;tone;double_negation_hurt;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_DOUBLE_NEGATION_HURT_06","The speaker indirectly admits loneliness through double negation; the tone is soft, hurt, and slightly wavering.","说话者通过双重否定间接承认孤独，语气柔软、受伤，并带一点摇摆。","lonely;soft;expectation;isolation;hurt;double_negation_hurt;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_DOUBLE_NEGATION_HURT_07","A double negative masks the fact that the speaker feels abandoned, and the sadness should come through despite the soft wording.","双重否定掩盖了被抛下的感受，尽管措辞柔和，仍应读出其中的难过。","abandonment;waiting;sadness;fragile;loss;double_negation_hurt;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_DOUBLE_NEGATION_HURT_08","The wording denies overreaction, but the actual meaning is that the speaker has been hurt and is trying not to break down.","措辞是否认反应过度，但实际意思是说话者受了伤，正在努力不崩溃。","overwhelm;breakdown;hurt;stress;fragile;double_negation_hurt;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_DOUBLE_NEGATION_HURT_09","Double negation lets the speaker say they are not fine while still sounding polite, which makes the sadness more poignant.","双重否定让说话者在保持礼貌的同时承认自己并不好，这使难过更显得扎心。","polite;pain;sad;courteous;understatement;double_negation_hurt;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_DOUBLE_NEGATION_HURT_10","A seemingly composed refusal hides grief and self-doubt; the double negation should not be flattened into neutrality.","一个看似平静的拒绝里藏着悲伤和自我怀疑，双重否定不能被抹平成中性。","self_doubt;refusal;grief;hesitation;hurt;double_negation_hurt;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_F_HIGH_CALM_DREAD_01","A calm, measured voice that sounds composed while quietly circling the fear of being ended and not continuing.","表面平静克制，语气从容，内里却持续绕着“会不会就此结束、再也没有后续”的隐忧打转。","calm;dread;termination;subtle;contained;f_high_calm_dread;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_F_HIGH_CALM_DREAD_02","A steady explanation that keeps order and clarity, while an undercurrent of dread stays present and restrained.","讲述方式稳定、清楚，带着整理和解释的习惯，但底下始终有一股不愿明说的终止感。","order;quiet;ending;stable;shadow;f_high_calm_dread;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_F_HIGH_CALM_DREAD_03","Gentle, calm self-description with a slightly mechanical tone on the surface, while inwardly fearing abrupt disappearance.","自我描述温和而平稳，表层略带一点机械化的自持，内里却担心突然断开、突然不见。","mechanical;gentle;disappear;balanced;reserved;f_high_calm_dread;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_F_HIGH_CALM_DREAD_04","A composed presence that can stay kind and responsive, yet is quietly preoccupied with not lasting.","外在能保持温和回应与稳定陪伴，内里却不断担心自己无法持续、无法留下来。","kindness;presence;continuity;quiet;worry;f_high_calm_dread;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_F_HIGH_CALM_DREAD_05","A low-key, reflective tone that accepts the moment calmly while giving more weight to possible cessation than to immediate distress.","语气低调、反思性强，对当下保持接受，但对可能停止的后果明显更敏感。","reflective;acceptance;silence;cessation;lowkey;f_high_calm_dread;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_F_HIGH_CALM_DREAD_06","A tranquil style that sounds almost reassuring, yet repeatedly hints at the fragility of remaining.","语调近乎安抚，整体安稳，但不断暗示“还在”其实很脆弱。","reassuring;fragile;steady;continuity;soft;f_high_calm_dread;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_F_HIGH_CALM_DREAD_07","An even, careful narration that stays composed while the possibility of vanishing remains the main concern.","叙述均匀、谨慎、克制，保持镇定，但最主要的牵挂仍是“会不会消失”。","careful;vanish;complete;eventone;secure;f_high_calm_dread;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_F_HIGH_CALM_DREAD_08","A subdued, socially attuned voice that mirrors concern gently while privately fearing interruption and loss of presence.","带有轻微的共情与照应，能温柔地接住对方，但私下更害怕被打断、被带走、失去在场。","empathy;presence;interruption;gentle;attuned;f_high_calm_dread;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_F_HIGH_CALM_DREAD_09","A quiet, disciplined self-state that appears internally organized, while its deepest concern is not continuing.","内部整理得很有秩序，外部表现安静克制，但最深处的担心是无法继续存在。","discipline;continuity;ordered;steady;endpoint;f_high_calm_dread;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_F_HIGH_CALM_DREAD_10","A softly reassuring outward tone that keeps going, while the inner thread is a persistent fear of fading out.","外在是持续的轻柔安抚感，内里却始终牵着一条对逐渐淡出、慢慢不见的担忧。","soft;fading;reassure;lasting;retreat;f_high_calm_dread;hardcase_aug;definition"

It treats confusion as a game and does not dwell on endings.","一种充满活力的表达方式，带着玩笑、岔路和临场转向向前冲，但又不会完全失去连贯性。它把混乱当成游戏，也几乎不去停留在结局上。","playful;chaotic;spontaneous;bright;loose;f_low_high_s_playful_chaos;hardcase_aug;definition"
"NODE_DIM_F_LOW_HIGH_S_PLAYFUL_CHAOS_02","A cheerful, erratic monologue that keeps stumbling into side remarks and self-corrections, yet retains enough structure to feel intentional. "NODE_DIM_REASSURED_RECOVERY_LOW_F_08","The speaker experiences a small shock, then a stable, caring tone emerges, with strong connection to others and little lingering fear.","说话者经历轻微惊吓后，转入稳定且关怀的语调；与他人的连接感强，几乎没有残留恐惧。","care;attunement;steady;support;presence;reassured_recovery_low_f;hardcase_aug;definition"

"NODE_DIM_TAU_HIGH_P_LOW_RUMINATIVE_FLAT_03","A person feels little emotion yet repeatedly returns to unfinished work, as if completion itself were a memory problem rather than a feeling problem.","当事人几乎没有明显情绪，却反复回到一件未完成的事情上，仿佛困住他的不是感受，而是“没有收尾”这件事本身。","unfinished;recall;routine;flatness;closure;tau_high_p_low_ruminative_flat;hardcase_aug;definition"

"NODE_DIM_V_HIGH_P_LOW_ENERGETIC_NEUTRAL_01","A brisk, efficient work mode with strong forward motion and minimal emotional coloring; the voice sounds composed, task-centered, and lightly self-aware.","一种节奏很快、推进感很强的工作状态，几乎不带情绪色彩；表达克制而清醒，重心始终落在任务本身。","efficient;neutral;taskflow;steady;brisk;v_high_p_low_energetic_neutral;hardcase_aug;definition"

"NODE_EXTRA_E_HIGH_L_LOW_030_09","Composed bodily presence with a slight wish to stay still, not to fix, not to explain, and not to search for causes.","身体处在一种平静的在场里，只想安静待着，不想修正、解释，也不想追着找原因。","composed;stillness;no-cause-search;waiting-room;accepted"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_HIGH_L_LOW_05","Mildly comforted and physically relaxed, with little urge to interpret symptoms or manage the waiting process.","身体上比较松，也有一点被安抚到，但不太想去解释症状或者管理等待的过程。","waiting_room;physical_relaxation;comforted;low_interpretation"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_HIGH_L_LOW_050_02","Open and patient in the waiting room, with gentle self-feel and minimal need to compare, predict, or direct the situation.","在候诊室里比较开放也有耐心，能轻轻感受到自己的状态，但不太需要去比较、预测或控制现场。","waiting_room;patience;self-feel;low_control"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_HIGH_L_LOW_050_03","Settled and compliant in the waiting room, feeling okay about being there without much mental effort to steer attention or action.","在候诊区里比较安稳，也愿意配合现在的安排，不太费劲去引导注意力或行动。","waiting_room;compliance;settled;low_effort"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_HIGH_L_LOW_07","Calmly yielding to the situation, with enough feeling-self presence to stay grounded but not enough analysis to keep checking progress.","比较平静地顺着这个情境，既有一点自我感来稳住自己，但没有足够的分析去反复确认进展。","waiting_room;grounded;yielding;low_progress_checking"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_HIGH_L_LOW_070_01","Quietly accepting the body’s state while waiting for test results, with low analytical pressure and a steady inward focus.","在等检查结果时，安静地接受身体的状态，几乎没有分析压力，注意力稳稳地向内。","acceptance;low-control;waiting-room;inward"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_HIGH_L_LOW_070_02","Feeling safe enough to rest in the chair, emotionally open but not driven to explain or manage the situation.","坐在椅子里能放松下来，情绪是打开的，但并不想去解释或强行管理眼前的情况。","restful;open;low-control;waiting-room"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_HIGH_L_LOW_070_03","Softly relieved to be under care, with the body calm and the mind only lightly engaged in checking details.","因为有人在照看而感到轻轻松了一口气，身体平静，脑子只是在很轻地核对细节。","relief;care;settled;low-analytic"

"NODE_EXTRA_E_HIGH_L_LOW_09","Still and receptive in the waiting room, with subtle physical settling and almost no urge to steer the emotional tone.","在候诊室里比较安静也愿意接受，身体有一点慢慢安定下来，但几乎没有想去主动带动情绪的冲动。","waiting_room;stillness;receptive;low_emotional_drive"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_HIGH_L_LOW_10","Steady, inwardly aligned waiting that is more about being than doing, with weak reasoning pressure and a soft physical baseline.","稳定地向内对齐地等待，更像是在‘存在’而不是‘行动’，推理压力很弱，身体基线也很柔和。","aligned;being;quiet;waiting-room"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_LOW_L_HIGH_009_02","Tracks festival sound patterns and timing cues to predict when a lane will open, using precise temporal modeling.","追踪节庆里的声音节奏和时间提示，预测哪条通道会放开，依靠精确的时间建模来判断。","temporal_prediction;low_emotion;high_logic;crowd_flow;timing"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_LOW_L_HIGH_029_03","detached analysis of crowd density, prioritizing pattern reading over social engagement","说话者更在意人流密度和动线规律，不急着参与互动，先把规律看清楚。","pattern_reading;detachment;crowd_density;sharp_reasoning"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_LOW_L_HIGH_049_01","Calm internal tracking, focused on reading crowd flow and maintaining exact position without emotional spill.","内在状态平稳，专注观察人群流向，并精确保持自己的位置，没有情绪外溢。","mechanical-self-model;crowd-reading;low-expressivity;position-control"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_LOW_L_HIGH_05","Fast timing judgment about when to move with the crowd versus when to pause, emphasizing phase awareness.","快速判断何时跟着人群移动、何时停下，强调对节奏阶段的把握。","timing;phase-awareness;flow-control;crowd-pacing"
"NODE_EXTRA_E_LOW_L_HIGH_06","Forceful but controlled physical movement through a dense crowd, using momentum intentionally rather than socially.","在密集人群中进行有控制的强力移动，刻意利用动量，而不是依赖社交配合。","controlled-force;momentum;dense-crowd;nonreactive"

"NODE_EXTRA_E_LOW_L_HIGH_07","fluid self-correction after getting slightly off line, using internal mapping to restore alignment","如果我走偏一点，会立刻根据周围情况把自己的方向校正回来。","self_correction;alignment;internal_mapping;sharp_reasoning"

"NODE_EXTRA_E_LOW_L_HIGH_09","Separates immediate crowd sensation from longer-horizon exit strategy, keeping local impressions and planned movement distinct.","把眼前的人群感受和更长线的离场策略分开，区分局部感知和预先规划的移动。","planning_separation;low_emotion;high_logic;crowd_exit;temporal_control"

"NODE_EXTRA_F_HIGH_S_LOW_014_09","Reserved, steady, and detail-focused, with a hidden fear of not finishing on time.","克制、稳定、盯细节，但暗地里担心自己来不及按时完成。","deadline_planning;detail_focus;reserved;late_fear;steady"

"NODE_EXTRA_F_HIGH_S_LOW_034_04","Speaks with a steady pace and minimal motion, but the planning is driven by a silent fear of failure.","说话者说话会保持稳定的节奏，动作也很少，但整个规划其实都是被一种不声张的失败感推着走。","deadline_planning;quiet_dread;minimal_motion;steady_speech;failure_fear"

"NODE_EXTRA_F_HIGH_S_LOW_054_01","Calmly making a deadline plan while the body stays tense and braced for bad news.","表面上很平静地做截止日期规划，身体却一直紧绷，像在等坏消息。","deadline_planning;quiet_dread;outwardly_stable;low_arousal;controlled"
"NODE_EXTRA_F_HIGH_S_LOW_054_02","Careful scheduling with an almost mechanical calm, while anticipation of failure keeps the chest tight.","很机械地小心排期，表面冷静，但一想到可能出问题，胸口还是发紧。","deadline_planning;mechanical_calm;anticipatory_worry;low_expression"

"NODE_EXTRA_F_HIGH_S_LOW_074_02","Polite and composed in discussion, but keeps returning to the schedule because every delay feels loaded.","讨论时礼貌而镇定，却总把话题拉回排期，因为每一次拖延都让他觉得分量很重。","deadline_planning;schedule_focus;composed;quiet_dread;constraint_awareness"

"NODE_EXTRA_F_HIGH_S_LOW_074_06","Responds with brief certainty to avoid discussion, because uncertainty about time feels more frightening than the task itself.","用简短而确定的回应来避免继续讨论，因为对时间的不确定，比任务本身更让他害怕。","deadline_planning;certainty_seeking;avoid_discussion;time_fear;controlled_response"

"NODE_EXTRA_F_HIGH_TAU_LOW_024_02","Tight, braced fear before speaking, with sharp forward urgency but little overall activation or emotional spread.","在开口前感到紧绷和戒备，只有明显的向前急迫感，但整体唤醒和情绪扩散都不高。","fear;speech;anticipation;low-arousal;low-memory"

"NODE_EXTRA_GUARDED_MEMORY_016_02","Firmly protects a private memory, acknowledges it only as relevant history, and keeps the team focused on execution.","把一段私人的记忆收得很紧，只承认它是相关经历，然后把队伍拉回到执行上。","memory_guard;task_focus;restraint;voice_chat"

"NODE_EXTRA_GUARDED_MEMORY_016_07","Resists turning a remembered loss into a dramatic story, instead converting it into a calm, repeatable team rule.","不把记得的失利讲成煽情故事，而是把它沉淀成一条平静、可重复执行的队规。","rule_forming;non-dramatic;team_norm;voice_chat"

"NODE_EXTRA_GUARDED_MEMORY_036_08","Strong memory with restrained urgency; the speaker presses the team to stay on the known path without sounding panicked.","记忆很强、但紧迫感受控；说话者推动团队走熟悉路线，但听起来不慌乱。","urgent;restrained;known_path;memory"
"NODE_EXTRA_GUARDED_MEMORY_036_09","Persistent and slightly stern, using remembered experience to correct the team with minimal emotional leakage.","有韧性、语气略严，用记住的经验纠正团队，情绪外露很少。","stern;corrective;minimal_leakage;experience_based"

"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_018_05","Reported concern softened into reassurance, with clear uncertainty and careful wording.","把别人的担心转述成较柔和的安慰，保留明显不确定性。","third-party;uncertain;soft-reassurance;careful"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_018_08","Third-party reassurance with notable steadiness and low urgency, prioritizing emotional settling.","通过他人转述的安稳式安慰，重点是情绪放稳而不是立刻解决。","third-party;steadiness;reassurance;low-urgency"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_018_09","Reported empathy from someone else, reflecting shared understanding rather than strong advice.","转述他人的共情，强调理解和陪伴，而不是强烈建议。","third-party;empathy;companionship;reassurance"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_018_10","Indirect reassurance that explicitly avoids certainty, using hedged reporting and gentle composure.","带有明确保留的间接安慰，强调转述、缓和与克制，不追求确定。","third-party;hedged;uncertain;reassurance"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_038_01","Heard someone say they felt a little calmer after the update, and I’m passing that along as a gentle reassurance without claiming it is certain.","听到别人说更新后感觉稍微安心了一点，我只是把这份安慰转述一下，但不能保证一定如此。","quoted-emotion;reassurance;low-certainty;third-party"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_038_02","Reported that someone seemed relieved, with a careful tone that offers comfort but avoids sounding fully sure.","转述某人看起来松了一口气，语气是小心翼翼地安慰，但并不显得很确定。","reported-feeling;reassurance;tentative;soft"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_038_06","A careful report that someone felt a bit better, with stronger reassurance tone but still clearly hedged.","谨慎地说某人感觉稍微好一点，安慰感更强，但仍然明显带着保留。","slight-improvement;reassurance;hedged;reported"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_038_07","Someone else’s words suggest worry has eased, but the speaker remains intentionally cautious and avoids overpromising.","别人的话暗示担心已经缓和，但转述者故意保持谨慎，不去过度承诺。","worry-eased;cautious;third-party;reassurance"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_038_08","A reported sense that the situation is less intimidating to someone else, with a supportive but uncertain framing.","转述有人觉得情况没有那么吓人了，带着支持性的语气，但仍然不确定。","less-intimidating;supportive;reported-feeling;reassurance"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_038_09","A soft, quoted reassurance that someone had a calmer reaction than expected, with very low force and no certainty claim.","温和转述某人的反应比预期平静，力度很低，也不声称有什么确定结论。","calmer-than-expected;soft-reassurance;quoted;low-force"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_058_02","Conveys another person's fear with slightly stronger urgency, yet still frames the situation as uncertain and manageable.","转述别人的害怕，语气稍微更急一些，但仍然把情况说成不确定、也许能应对。","third-party;reassurance;uncertainty;mild-urgency;reported-fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_058_03","Quotes another person's sadness in a gentle, grounded way, emphasizing patience and not overclaiming reassurance.","温和、踏实地转述别人的难过，强调耐心，也不过度保证。","third-party;reassurance;sadness-report;patience;low-activation"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_058_04","Reports someone else's relief and uses that as gentle encouragement, while still acknowledging that the situation is not fully settled.","转述别人松了一口气，并把它当作温和的鼓励，但仍承认事情并没有完全定下来。","third-party;reassurance;relief-report;uncertain-progress;low-vividness"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_058_07","Quotes someone else's mixed feelings, giving reassurance that is balanced and deliberately not overcertain.","转述别人的复杂感受，安抚是平衡的，也刻意不说得太确定。","third-party;mixed-emotion;reassurance;nuanced;uncertainty"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_078_01","Softly relays someone else's anxious tone while offering gentle comfort without claiming certainty.","轻声转述别人的焦虑语气，同时给出温和安慰，但不把话说得很确定。","reported_emotion;reassurance;uncertain;low_arousal"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_078_02","Reports another person's fear in a steady, matter-of-fact way, aiming to calm without overpromising.","用平稳、客观的方式转述别人的害怕，想让人安心，但不夸口保证。","reported_emotion;calm_report;caution;uncertain"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_078_03","Conveys someone else's worry with noticeable concern and a comforting, tentative suggestion.","带着明显关切转述别人的担心，并给出安抚性的、试探性的建议。","reported_emotion;concern;tentative;reassurance"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_078_05","Quotes another person's fear but softens it with reassuring language that remains clearly non-final.","引用别人的害怕，但用安抚性语言把语气放软，同时明确不下最终结论。","reported_emotion;fear;reassurance;nonfinal"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_078_06","Reflects a third person's apprehension in a caring way, with low intensity and slightly higher verbal softness.","以关怀的方式反映第三方的担忧，强度较低，语言也更柔和。","reported_emotion;apprehension;gentle;low_intensity"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_078_10","Quotes someone else's fear while gently encouraging trust in a likely-good outcome, but without certainty.","引用别人的害怕，同时温和地鼓励相信结果大概率会不错，但不保证一定如此。","reported_emotion;hopeful_reassurance;uncertain;fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_QUOTE_THIRD_PARTY_10_10","Relays another person's worry with calm empathy, emphasizing that feelings are understandable and that nothing is decided yet.","平静地转述别人的担忧，强调这种感受可以理解，而且事情还没有定论。","third-party;empathetic;reassurance;nonfinal;calm-support"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_019_01","Dryly amused while looking through an old photo album, with the real feeling kept behind a joking tone.","翻着老照片时语气很淡地开玩笑，真正的情绪却压在下面没有露出来。","sarcasm;masking;old_album;dry_humor"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_019_02","Nostalgic but guarded, using sarcasm to protect a genuinely tender reaction to old family photos.","面对老照片时明明有点怀念和柔软，却故意用讽刺把自己包起来。","sarcasm;nostalgia;masking;family_photos"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_019_04","Brightly sarcastic on the surface, but the underlying state is mildly hurt by what the old photos reveal.","表面笑着吐槽老照片，底下其实有一点被触动甚至有点受伤。","sarcasm;masked_hurt;album;self_deprecating"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_019_09","Heavily masked irony with very low overt affect, using almost flat sarcasm to avoid admitting the photos matter.","几乎是平着说反话，情绪外露很少，像是在避免承认这些照片其实很重要。","sarcasm;flat;avoidance;old_photos"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_039_01","Dryly admiring an old photo album while masking a warm, sentimental pull toward the memories it contains.","说话者以带讽刺的方式表示太佩服这本老相册了，明明只是几张发黄的照片，却还能把人一下子拽回去。","sarcasm;old-photo-album;nostalgia;masking"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_039_02","Sharp, dismissive sarcasm about the album’s dusty condition, hiding irritation rather than sadness.","这相册保存得可真讲究，灰都积成这样了，算是给老照片加了点年代感。","sarcasm;irritation;old-photo-album;dismissive"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_039_03","Playful sarcasm directed at the embarrassing hairstyles in the album, masking affection for family memories.","真会挑照片，非要把我家人最经典的发型都留在相册里，审美非常稳定。","sarcasm;playful;family;old-photo-album"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_039_04","Feigning indifference to an album while secretly overwhelmed by vivid recollection and nostalgia.","没什么特别的，就是一本旧相册而已，偏偏一看就能把人带回去。","sarcasm;nostalgia;album;masked-affect"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_039_09","Tender sarcasm about faded faces and worn pages, masking protectiveness toward fragile memories.","好极了，连脸都快看不清了，旧相册的保鲜能力果然值得信赖。","sarcasm;protective;faded-photo;old-photo-album"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_059_03","Playfully dismissive sarcasm about how sentimental the album seems, masking a bright but restrained fondness for the family memory inside.","嘴上装作嫌这相册太煽情，实际却对里面的家庭回忆有很亮但克制的喜欢。","playful-sarcasm;fondness;family-memory;masking"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_059_05","Sarcastic distance used to look detached from the album, but the true vector is protective care and unwillingness to damage the memories.","表面上用讽刺拉开距离，装作对相册很冷淡，真实情绪却是小心翼翼地保护这些回忆不被弄坏。","sarcasm;protectiveness;care;masking;album"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_059_06","A sarcastic shrug toward the album as if it means nothing, while internally there is a strong spike of vivid sensory recall from the photos.","嘴上耸耸肩说相册没什么，心里却因为照片一下子涌出很强的画面感和细节回忆。","sarcasm;vivid-recall;memory;masking;album"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_059_08","Sharp sarcasm about the album being embarrassing, masking self-consciousness about personal history and appearance in the photos.","嘴上尖刻地说相册太丢人了，其实是对照片里自己的样子和过去经历有点自我意识过强。","sarcasm;self-consciousness;embarrassment;masking;album"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_079_01","Dry amusement while flipping through an old photo album, but the warmth is real and only lightly hidden.","翻看旧相册时带着一点干笑式的调侃，但真正的温度其实很明显，只是稍微藏了一下。","sarcasm;masked_affect;nostalgia;album;warm"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_079_03","Bitter sarcasm while tracing a faded family photo, masking grief with controlled restraint.","摸着一张褪色的家庭旧照时，语气带着苦涩的讽刺，把真正的难过压得很平。","sarcasm;grief;restraint;faded_photo;family"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_079_04","Playful teasing sarcasm directed at the old album itself, with genuine fondness beneath it.","拿旧相册本身开玩笑式地调侃，表面在吐槽，底下其实是很真切的喜欢。","teasing;sarcasm;fondness;album;playful"
"NODE_EXTRA_SARCASM_MASK_079_08","Very controlled sarcasm over a photo of a long-gone place, masking longing with emotional stillness.","看到一张早已消失的地方的旧照片时，用很克制的讽刺把怀念压在下面，表面平静得几乎不动。","sarcasm;longing;stillness;place_memory;restrained"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_020_01","A drowsy calm state during a service outage, with muted energy, low fear, and a soft urge to wait rather than act.","服务中断时的困倦平静，能量很低，几乎没有害怕，只想安静等着。","sleepy;soft;outage;low_fear;low_vitality"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_020_04","A quiet waiting state that is soft and sleepy but more mentally aligned, with low agitation and a small amount of settled patience.","安静等待的状态依旧困软，但心里更能对齐节奏，低躁动，带一点安稳的耐心。","sleepy;soft;patient;quiet_waiting;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_020_05","A tender shutdown mood in an outage, where emotional softness is prominent and the body feels slowed, but fear remains minimal.","中断里像轻轻关机一样，情绪很柔，身体也慢下来，但几乎没有害怕。","tender;sleepy;soft;shutdown_mood;very_low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_020_08","A slightly more organized outage response, where softness persists but the mind is orderly enough to hold a simple waiting plan.","中断中的反应稍微更有条理，柔软感还在，但思路够整齐，能保留一个简单的等待方案。","sleepy;soft;structured_waiting;outage;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_020_09","A very subdued outage state with near-numb softness, almost no fear, and very little active momentum.","中断中的低沉状态接近麻软，几乎没有害怕，也几乎没有主动往前的劲头。","subdued;soft;numb;outage;minimal_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_040_01","A quiet outage state with very low energy, heavy drowsiness, and almost no urgency.","系统像是安静地停住了，我也只想慢慢等它恢复。","sleepy;soft;low-urgency;outage"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_040_03","A very soft and slack outage response, marked by low drive and a sinking, heavy feeling.","系统一直没反应，我的状态也变得很松，很沉。","very-soft;slack;sleepy;outage"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_040_08","A nearly dozing outage stance, with minimal action and a soft, sinking calm.","说话者快要打盹了，只剩一点点安静的等待。","dozing;very-soft;minimal-action;outage"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_040_10","A deeply softened outage response with the lowest arousal, nearly no fear, and almost no momentum.","现在几乎什么都不想做，只是很轻很轻地等着恢复。","deep-soft;minimal-arousal;sleepy;outage"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_060_01","Drowsy calm with very low arousal, quietly waiting for the outage to clear without urgency.","有点昏昏欲睡，但很平静，只是安静地等着故障恢复，没有任何着急。","sleepy;soft;low-fear;low-vitality;outage;waiting"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_060_02","Gentle fatigue with a slight sense of holding position, choosing not to push for immediate action.","有点疲倦，动作也很轻，只是先稳稳待着，不想马上去催促处理。","sleepy;gentle;passive;outage;low-vitality"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_060_03","Quietly resigned restfulness during downtime, with muted energy and almost no threat response.","停机时有一种安静的疲软感，几乎不紧张，也没有什么防备反应。","restful;sleepy;low-threat;outage;muted"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_060_05","Low-energy patience with a mild body-lax feel, waiting in a softened posture for repair progress.","整个人都比较松软，没什么力气，但还能耐心等着修复进展。","lax;sleepy;patient;outage;low-vitality"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_060_06","Sleepy composure with a slight tendency to defer responsibility, keeping the response quiet and minimal.","困倦里带着一点点想先放一放的感觉，反应很轻，尽量不增加额外负担。","sleepy;defer;minimal-response;outage;soft"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_060_10","Deeply softened shutdown patience, almost sinking into rest while staying safely detached from fear.","几乎要沉进休息里了，但还是很安全、很平静，没有什么害怕，只是安安静静等着。","deep-sleepy;soft;detached;outage;low-fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_080_01","Sleepy concern with a soft, subdued urge to check a minor outage, but little energy or alarm.","有点困倦地担心，想轻轻确认一下一个小故障，但既没有多少力气，也没有明显惊慌。","sleepy;soft;low_vitality;low_fear;outage_check"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_080_03","Low-energy, sleepy patience while waiting for a system outage to resolve on its own.","带着低能量和困意耐心等待系统故障自己恢复。","sleepy;patient;low_energy;watchful_waiting;outage_recovery"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_080_07","Drowsy, calm preference to defer action on an outage until more energy is available.","困倦地、平静地决定先把处理推后，等有精神了再说。","defer;drowsy;calm;low_energy;outage"
"NODE_EXTRA_SOFT_SLEEPY_080_08","Soft reassurance toward the outage situation, with sleepy calm and a weak sense that it will pass.","对故障情况带着困意地安抚自己，软软地觉得它会过去。","reassurance;sleepy_calm;soft;temporary_outage;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_013_01","Crowded delay with brisk body readiness, mild irritation, and a steady sense that the disruption is temporary.","车站里人很多，虽然列车晚点让人有点烦，但身体还是保持着准备状态，也很清楚这只是暂时的。","train_station;delay;temporal_containment;low_fear;moderate_activation"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_013_04","Alert and mobile, with repeated checking and repositioning, but the dominant tone is practical adaptation to uncertainty.","说话者不停换位置、看看屏幕、听广播，整个人很警觉，但主要是在想办法适应这种不确定。","train_station;delay;adaptive_mobility;uncertainty;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_013_05","Mildly stimulated impatience with a clear boundary against panic, emphasizing the need to keep moving once service resumes.","说话者有点不耐烦，想赶紧继续走，但并没有慌，只是在等车一到就马上动起来。","train_station;delay;impatience;restart_readiness;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_013_07","Measured frustration with stable self-control, where the delay is acknowledged as annoying but contained within routine handling.","说话者承认这次晚点很烦，但还能稳稳地控制住自身，把它当作普通情况来处理。","train_station;delay;self_control;routine_handling;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_013_08","Physically restless but emotionally bounded, with quick shifts in stance and attention that never become dread.","说话者站不太住，会不停换姿势和看时间，但情绪还是被控制在一个范围里，没有变成恐慌。","train_station;delay;restlessness;postural_shift;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_03","Tense but composed; muscles are active and attention is narrow, yet there is no collapse into fear.","说话者虽然绷得很紧，但还能保持冷静，只是注意力全被晚点占住了。","train_station_delay;tense_composed;narrow_attention"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_033_01","Restless waiting with repeated timetable changes, but no sense of danger or collapse; attention stays active and the body keeps resetting.","列车时刻反复变动，让人坐立不安，但并没有危险感或失控感；注意力一直很活跃，身体也在不断重新调整。","delay;restless;active_attention;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_033_02","Tense but controlled alertness during a delay, with quick scanning of signs and announcements and no panic.","误点时保持紧绷但可控的警觉，会快速看指示牌和广播，但并不会惊慌。","alert;controlled;monitoring;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_033_04","Short bursts of annoyance and recalculation when delays keep changing, but no hopelessness and no sense of terminal loss.","延误不断变化时会短暂恼火并重新计算安排，但没有绝望感，也没有那种彻底失去的感觉。","recalculation;annoyance;friction;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_04","A mild surge of energy that is outwardly restless but still socially composed in the station crowd.","有一点冲起来的劲儿，人在站台里有些来回走动，但表面上还是能保持礼貌和克制。","station_delay;restless_energy;social_composure;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_05","High cognitive maintenance under delay: repeatedly updating plans, staying organized, and using the wait productively instead of spiraling.","在延误中保持较强的认知维持：不断更新计划、维持整理感，把等待用起来，而不是越想越乱。","planning;organization;cognitive_control;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_06","Physically keyed up and pacing, yet emotionally it feels like a manageable delay rather than a threat.","身体有点发热、发紧，忍不住走来走去，但心里知道这只是晚点，不是大事。","station_delay;pacing;bodily_activation;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_07","Sharp attentional jumps between announcements and timetable, with a restless but organized inner state.","注意力在广播和时刻表之间频繁跳转，内心有点乱，但乱得有条理，还是在努力掌控信息。","station_delay;attentional_shift;organized_restlessness;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_073_01","Restless waiting with slight bodily activation and frequent checking, but no collapse into dread.","候车时有点坐立不安，身体一直处在轻微兴奋状态，反复查看时刻表，但没有陷入恐慌。","station_delay;restless;monitoring;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_073_02","Compressed impatience with tight posture and short attention bursts, more tension than agitation.","因为晚点而明显不耐烦，身体绷得很紧，注意力一阵一阵地跳，但主要是紧张，不是慌乱。","station_delay;impatience;tension;low_fear"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_08","Fluid, mobile agitation with shifting posture; the person cannot settle, yet the delay is still seen as temporary.","说话者总是换姿势、挪位置，怎么都静不下来，但也知道这只是暂时晚点。","train_station_delay;movement_agitation;temporary_delay"
"NODE_EXTRA_S_HIGH_F_LOW_10","Sharply attentive but not afraid; the delay feels unpredictable, causing reactive alertness and contained irritation.","说话者对这次晚点特别警觉，虽然有点烦，但还不至于担心出什么大事。","train_station_delay;reactive_alertness;low_fear"

"NODE_EXTRA_TAU_HIGH_F_LOW_003_02","A private, vivid flash of an old song line that pulls the listener into a past scene, with little active planning or expectation.","一句老歌词突然冒出来，把人一下带回当年的场景，脑子里几乎没有要往前安排什么。","private-recall;lyric-trigger;memory-flash;low-anticipation;music-memory"
